introSection: Little Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Sandy Lake Amusement Park in Carrollton, Texas, USA. Built by Allan Herschell Company, it opened in 1971.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a Little Dipper model. White track and supports.

fullText:
Little Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Sandy Lake Amusement Park in Carrollton, Texas, USA. Built by Allan Herschell Company, it opened in 1971.

The ride is a Little Dipper model. White track and supports.
